category_sources: Official liblo homepage describes OSC implementation and API documentation.
source_facts.description says liblo is a lightweight Open Sound Control implementation.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the project documentation hub with README, release notes, changelog, and platform notes.
Official homepage links to HTML API documentation online.
repo_sources: Official liblo homepage says the GitHub repository is preferred for active development and links View Git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Open Sound Control implementation.
source_facts.executables lists oscdump, oscsend, and oscsendfile CLI tools.
